[Skip to content](https://www.okantowermiami.com/#content)

# Miami’s Ultimate Lifestyle Landmark

[SCROLL DOWN](https://www.okantowermiami.com/#an-instant-icon)

## All Eyes On Okan

With its alluring curved façade and soaring height, Okan Tower is the dramatic centerpiece of the downtown Miami skyline. From here, the entire city seems to revolve around you. For those fortunate enough to call this place home... it actually does.

![Okan Tower Sketch](https://www.okantowermiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/okan-tower.svg)

[SCROLL DOWN](https://www.okantowermiami.com/#the-location)

THE LOCATION

## Connected to the Urban Core

The city of Miami is a unique mosaic of multiple experiences in one destination.

There is the stunning beauty of Biscayne Bay, the historic charm of the Flagler Redevelopment District, the fashionable energy of Brickell, the creativity of the Arts & Entertainment District, and progress in all directions. Right in the very center is Okan Tower – your gateway to all South Florida has to offer.

![Downtown Miami skyscape with Okan Tower at the center. New Development in Miami](https://www.okantowermiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/aerial_poi_okan.jpg)

UNMATCHED ACCESSIBILITY

### A Global Gateway

From its ideal position in the middle of the city center, Okan Tower is only minutes from key transportation routes. One block from the property is the downtown Metromover loops and Government Center Metrorail Station with service to Miami International Airport. Major highways, the all-new Brightline commuter rail station, and Port Miami are close by too, placing the world at your fingertips.

THRIVING COMMERCE

### An International Business Hub

Miami has steadily risen to become a world capital for finance, real estate, technology, international law, travel & hospitality, and more. Tremendous continued growth is expected for the future, and Okan Tower is at the crossroads of it all.

DOWNTOWN RESIDENCES

### City Living, Perfected

Living at Okan Tower means being at the forefront of an exciting urban residential experience. Walk to parks, shops, restaurants, museums, professional sports, concerts, the performing arts, festivals, and nightlife. Or, delight in the waters of Biscayne Bay or the Miami River, or venture to Miami Beach and the Atlantic Ocean for upscale coastal relaxation.

5 MIN AWAY

- FTX Arena
- Arsht Center for the performing Arts
- Bayfront Park & Amphitheater
- Bayside Marketplace
- Government Center

# Okan Tower

### **Downtown Miami / 2028**

70 Stories / 385 Residences of
Studios, 1 - 3 Bedrooms

**555 N Miami Ave Miami, FL 33136 USA**

[+1.305.647.2656](tel:13056472656)

Average Price: $1,500 x SF ($16,146 x M2)

The Okan Tower is a 70-story luxury condominium-hotel project introduced in 2016. Its graceful curved apex and lightly rippling glass façade were inspired by the beauty of a tulip blossom. All residences feature unobstructed bay and city skyline views, while at the same time infusing the residences with natural light. It was designed by architecture firm Behar Font & Partners. Residences offer open, flowing layouts, exquisite attention to detail, and luxurious finishes and fixtures throughout. Amenities will include a sky pool located on the 70th floor, outdoor lounge, spa, state-of-the-art health and fitness center, wine cellar and much more.

[1 Condo For Sale](https://miamiresidential.com/okantower/#ForSale) from $1,250,000

Average Listing: $1,678 x SF ($18,060 x M2)

Average Price: $1,500 x SF ($16,146 x M2)

## Features

### Building Features

- State-of-the art fitness center
- Residential spa with sauna, steam and treatment room
- Sunset roof deck
- Private resort-sized pool with outdoor lounge and private cabanas
- Wine cellar and lounge
- Residential cinema screening room
- Kid's room
- High-speed elevators with separate access points
- 24-hour concierge staff
- In-home private spa treatments
- Professional housekeeping services
- On-site laundry and dry cleaning
- Access to personal trainers and fitness specialists
- 24-Hour front desk reception and valet parking
- Dedicated maintenance and engineering staff
- State-of-the-art multi-service spa, featuring
Turkish hamman
- 24-hour security
- Gourmet restaurant serving breakfast, lunch and
dinner, plus grab-and-go cafe and multiple bars
- Conference and meeting rooms
- Over 4,500 square feet of ballroom space
available, including full catering and kitchen facility

### Residence Features

- High-speed elevators with separate access points
- Floor-to-ceiling windows and glass-lined balconies for truly limitless views
- 10 Ft ceiling height
- European cabinetry in kitchens and bathrooms
- Top of the line appliances
- Pre-wired for state-of-the-art internet and communications
- Smart home technology

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/09-Okan-Tower-Pool-November-2021-e1678570530581.jpg)

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/Developer-Okan-Group.jpg)

OKAN Group was founded in 1972 and up until now it has been an industrial company which carried on its activities by means of international experience and high-level technology. Investments in Turkic Republics, mainly Turkmenistan and Kazakhstan, have been carried out by means of successful projects in 90’s. These projects are related to banking, food production buildings and hotel management marketing. Furthermore, Okan Holding expands as a contractor firm in various countries. The Okan Holding team always seeks the best and keeps its responsibilities for a developed economy and for a good future.
